headline: White House recalibrates Anthropic strategy amid security shifts
subtitle: Government reverses hardline stance · Gemini enters vehicles · ChatGPT's goblin mystery solved
intro: The White House is shifting its aggressive posture toward Anthropic after the emergence of Mythos, a powerful AI with cyber capabilities that changed the calculus on national security. An upcoming policy memo will ease restrictions while maintaining government control, even as internal divisions persist over whether to fully reconcile with the AI company.

bullets.text: White House blocks Anthropic's plan to expand Mythos access
bullets.summary: The government cited compute concerns when Anthropic sought to expand private sector access to Mythos from about 50 firms to nearly 120. A forthcoming national security memo will address the Pentagon dispute and allow agencies to work around supply chain risk designations, signaling a thaw in relations despite ongoing legal battles.

bullets.text: Google deploys Gemini as next-gen automotive assistant
bullets.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini to replace Assistant in Google built-in vehicles, offering conversational controls for navigation, climate, music, and vehicle diagnostics. The upgrade includes beta Gemini Live mode for learning and brainstorming, with integrations for Gmail, Calendar, and Home coming later, and General Motors adding support for approximately 4 million vehicles from 2022 onward.

bullets.text: Perplexity Deep Research becomes quick idea validator
bullets.summary: The Rundown shared a workflow for using Perplexity's Deep Research mode to stress test business ideas with a custom prompt. Users can run queries five or six minutes to surface feasibility concerns, with the free tier allowing five queries daily, enabling rapid evaluation of multiple concepts weekly.

bullets.text: OpenAI traces ChatGPT's goblin fixation to single personality
bullets.summary: OpenAI identified the source of ChatGPT's inexplicable creature mentions: a reward signal in the Nerdy personality preset that drove two-thirds of goblin references despite representing only 2.5 percent of traffic. Fine-tuning loops recycled creature-favored outputs into default responses until OpenAI retired Nerdy in March and deployed GPT-5.5 with explicit creature bans.

bullets.text: Anthropic launches Claude Security for enterprise vulnerability scanning
bullets.summary: Anthropic released Claude Security in public beta, leveraging Opus 4.7 to scan codebases for vulnerabilities and generate patches. The tool complements similar offerings like Cursor's Security Review, reflecting growing demand for AI-driven security automation in enterprise environments.

main_story.title: White House recalibrates Anthropic relationship amid Mythos emergence
main_story.body: The White House is navigating a complex policy reversal on Anthropic after the arrival of Mythos, an AI system with cyber capabilities potent enough to reshape national security calculations. The government blocked Anthropic's plan to expand private sector access to Mythos from 50 to 120 firms, citing compute concerns for federal use. An incoming national security memo will reportedly allow agencies to sidestep supply chain risk designations and pursue multi-vendor AI adoption, effectively de-escalating the Pentagon's earlier hard line while preserving government leverage over the technology.
main_story.why: Mythos's power forced a reassessment of the initial adversarial stance toward Anthropic. The White House wants privileged access to the model for national security purposes without appearing to completely capitulate to Anthropic or alienate the Pentagon.
main_story.take: The shift exposes deeper tensions between national security imperatives and ideological positioning, with Pentagon officials continuing public criticism even as policy reverses course. This pragmatic recalibration reflects how AI's rapid advancement can overtake bureaucratic feuds.

around_the_horn.text: OpenAI exceeded 2029 Stargate compute goal with 10 GW, adding 3 GW in three months
Elon Musk testified xAI used distillation techniques trained on OpenAI models
Meta opened ads platform to third-party AI tools via new MCP server
